name: dharma-asana
description: Asana tools — My Tasks, task search, comments, projects — backed by the dharma CLI.

asana_token.title: Asana Personal Access Token
asana_token.description: In Asana, visit https://app.asana.com/0/my-apps → Create new token → copy it and paste it here. Note: the token gives Claude the same Asana access you have; you can revoke it anytime from that same page (uninstalling this extension does not revoke it).

workspace_gid.title: Workspace GID (optional)
workspace_gid.description: Leave blank if you only belong to one Asana workspace. If you belong to several, the tools will ask you to set this — paste the gid of the workspace to use (the error message lists your workspaces with their gids).
